description_long: This doll features a large, stylized head with bright red hair tied up in a voluminous ponytail, and expressive blue eyes set in a fair face. The body is slender and angular, dressed in a vibrant green and gold outfit with blue accents, reminiscent of fantasy or adventure-themed attire. The arms are elongated and extend outward, with one arm holding a large, flat, white object that resembles a sword or blade. The legs are thin and pointed, with gold and blue decorative elements, and the doll stands on a small, round, black and white base. The overall design is highly stylized, with exaggerated proportions and bold, saturated colors. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of painted plastic toys.
description: A stylized doll with bright red hair in a ponytail, blue eyes, and a green and gold fantasy outfit, holding a large white blade and standing on a round base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, red ponytail, blue eyes, and the large white blade extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the volume of the red hair, the green and gold outfit, and the thin, pointed legs on the round base.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the red ponytail and the back of the green and gold outfit, with the blade extending out of view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the head, the white blade, and the doll's arm and leg arrangement.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy-inspired outfit with a fitted green tunic, gold trim, blue accent panels, and pointed gold boots, reminiscent of adventure or RPG character costumes.
attribute_pose: Head facing forward, right arm extended outward holding a large white blade, left arm angled downward, legs straight and close together, standing on a round base.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide blue eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Long, bright red hair styled in a high, voluminous ponytail with loose strands framing the face.
